series_metadata.series_description: Records and reports compiled and received during construction of Ohio Department of Natural Resources (ODNR) Division of Engineering capital projects including, but not limited to, contracts with construction contractors, signed bid tabs, change orders, material testing reports, specifications, conformed drawings and field measurements. Also daily, weekly, and monthly field reports, shop drawings, inspection documents, earthwork drawings, cross-section calculations, survey notes, and aerial engineering data. Also pile test load reports, piling records, progress schedules and supplements, relevant correspondence, disaster records and similar documents. Also includes final pay applications with back-up information, completion certifications, final bound shop drawings, permits, studies, assessment, operation and maintenance manuals, final affidavits and similar documents.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Until converted to an electronic format or for 30 years after financial close of the project. Then shred. NOTE: Records will be kept in the Division of Engineering until expiration of the warranty period. If not converted to electronic format by end of warranty period, records will be forwarded to ODNR storage ; Electronic: 30 years after financial close of project, then delete ; Microform: 30 years after financial close of project, then delete, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete ; Microform: Delete
